unique_finding_notes: Every issue baseline found was also found by at least one harness version
prevention_notes: Fix code provided but no architecture tests or lint rules to prevent recurrence. NS-005 mentions adding middleware (prevention pattern). NS-007 gives throw code. NS-008 gives HMAC code.
systemic_notes: Each finding listed as isolated issue. No cross-cutting pattern identified (e.g., 'comment-as-policy' appears in NS-004, NS-003, NS-001 but not connected).
